cards.name: Clad in Many Colours
cards.quote: Bright hues weave a tapestry of hope against the shadows of the battlefield.
cards.actionEffect: To look upon him was to be dazzled and then uncertain. Allied units in radius 1 gain Fortified <sprite name="fortified"> and Arcane Insight <sprite name="arcaneinsight">; enemies in radius 1 gain Despair <sprite name="despair">.

cards.name: Camel Riders
cards.quote: With the sun at their backs, they charge across the sands like a storm.

cards.name: Chariot Riders
cards.quote: The wheels of war thunder forward, cutting paths through the chaos.

cards.name: Corsairs Of Umbar
cards.quote: From the shadows of Umbar, they strike with blades dipped in treachery.

cards.name: Easterling Cataphracts
cards.quote: Armored like the mountain, unyielding as the dawn they herald.

cards.name: Haradrim Cavalry
cards.quote: Hooves pound the earth, echoing the call of conquest in the desert winds.

cards.name: Haradrim Infantry
cards.quote: They stand as a wall of iron, resolute against the tides of war.

cards.name: Khand Easterlings
cards.quote: Warriors of the cold north, their spirits burn bright with the fire of battle.

cards.name: Mumakils
cards.quote: Titans of the battlefield, their rampage reshapes the very land.

cards.name: Southrons
cards.quote: With fierce hearts, they tread the sands, claiming the day as their own.

cards.name: Umbar Cavalry
cards.quote: Swift like the tide, they crash upon their foes with relentless fury.

cards.name: Umbar Riders
cards.quote: The dark sails of Umbar herald their arrival, swift and merciless.

cards.name: Uncautious Supper
cards.quote: A flame unwatched at meal may summon the long eye of night.
cards.actionEffect: At supper or rest, Hobbits in radius 2 lose Hidden <sprite name="hidden"> and take 15 damage.

cards.name: Rhun
cards.quote: Rhun is a far shore of smoke and mounted dust, where distant thunder gathers.

cards.name: Caradhras
cards.quote: The mountain stirs, a chill creeping through the hearts of the unprepared.
cards.actionEffect: Environmental event. Freezes enemy units on mountain tiles in radius 5.

cards.name: Restless East
cards.quote: The winds of the east carry whispers of strength and determination.
cards.actionEffect: The two easternmost allied armies gain +1 <sprite name="hc"> and +1 <sprite name="lc">

cards.name: Under the Rhunic Sun
cards.quote: The sun rises over the east, igniting the courage that lies within.
cards.actionEffect: The eastern sun burns away doubt. Easterling commanders reveal their hexes for 2 turns; 1 Easterling army gains +1 Light Cavalry <sprite name="lc">; Easterlings on patrol gain Encouraged <sprite name="encouraged">.

cards.name: Raid From The Mountains
cards.quote: The mountains whisper of swift vengeance; the raiders heed the call.
cards.actionEffect: All allied army commanders in mountains or hills gain Haste <sprite name="haste"> (1 turn) and Courage <sprite name="encouraged"> (1 turn).

cards.name: Avas of Igath
cards.quote: In the heat of battle, I find my true purpose and sharpen my resolve.

cards.name: Tros Hesnef
cards.quote: Wisdom guides my blade, and courage fuels my heart in this relentless tide.

cards.name: Southron Scout
cards.quote: Silent as the night, I see all and fear none in this vast land.

cards.name: Kav Makow
cards.quote: The desert speaks to me, its secrets unfurling like the sands beneath my feet.

cards.name: Sangarunya
cards.quote: Strength lies not just in steel, but in the heart that wields it.

cards.name: Uvatha
cards.quote: In the shadow of the Dark Lord, I carve my path through fear and flame.

cards.name: Haruth Rammam
cards.quote: The sands whisper of glory, and I shall let none forget my name.

cards.name: Angamaite
cards.quote: A blade is only as true as the heart that wields it.

cards.name: Huz
cards.quote: The roar of the desert is my battle cry; fear the storm I bring.

cards.name: Herumor
cards.quote: In darkness I thrive, for the shadows are my allies.

cards.name: Castamir
cards.quote: The tides of power shift, and I shall be their master.

cards.name: Rhun Corsairs
cards.quote: Swift as the wind, we strike like the very storms of the sea.

cards.name: Rhun Easterlings
cards.quote: In the face of adversity, our resolve becomes our greatest weapon.

cards.name: Storm from Orthanc
cards.quote: Saruman's word falls like iron from the tower, and the weary find themselves driven to one more deed.
cards.actionEffect: All friendly units in this hex can action again.

cards.name: LureOfTheEast
cards.quote: Come, wanderers of the West, let the East call you into shadow.
cards.actionEffect: All enemy Maia aligned free or neutral in radius 2 are teleported to random eastmost non-water hexes and Blocked <sprite name="blocked"> (1 turn).

cards.name: Sand Storm
cards.quote: A tempest of sand engulfs the land, blinding friend and foe alike.
cards.actionEffect: Environmental event. Halts all non-Southron units on desert tiles.

cards.name: Scents of the Haradrim
cards.quote: A whisper of poison carried on the winds of war strikes true.
cards.actionEffect: Target enemy character in your hex: deal moderate damage and apply Poisoned <sprite name="poisoned"> (2 turns).

cards.name: Easterling Resolve
cards.quote: In unity we stand, unyielding as the mountains of our homeland.
cards.actionEffect: Target allied character in your hex: gain Fortified <sprite name="fortified"> (1 turn) and Haste <sprite name="haste"> (1 turn).

cards.name: ElvesGoingWest
cards.quote: The shores of the West beckon, but despair holds them fast.
cards.actionEffect: The sea-longing cannot be denied forever. Choose 1 Elf in radius 3; they are moved 1 hex westward, gain Despair <sprite name="despair">, and lose Hidden <sprite name="hidden"> and their action this turn.

cards.name: TheLureOfTheSenses
cards.quote: In the haze of battle, the senses deceive, and danger lurks unseen.
cards.actionEffect: Block target enemy character for 1 turn. If it is a Maia, block it for 3 turns.

cards.name: Cruel Winter
cards.quote: The bitter chill of winter descends, freezing the hearts of the unprepared.
cards.actionEffect: Environmental event. All mountain enemy units have 7.5% chance to become Frozen <sprite name="frozen">.

cards.name: Twilight
cards.quote: In twilight's embrace, shadows lengthen and secrets are revealed.
cards.actionEffect: Environmental event: in radius 2, reduce visibility and clear scouting; allied dark-aligned PCs there become temporarily hidden.

cards.name: Khand
cards.quote: A land of scorching sands and fierce warriors, where honor is forged in battle.

cards.name: AmonLhaw
cards.quote: AmonLhaw watches the vale with a stillness that can outlast kingdoms.

cards.name: CamethBrin
cards.quote: CamethBrin rises over the fields like a warning that never forgot how to speak.

cards.name: FennasDrunin
cards.quote: At FennasDrunin, the water is still enough to hide danger and patient enough to keep it.

cards.name: KhandAmu
cards.quote: KhandAmu drinks the sun and gives back only heat, dust, and hard intent.

cards.name: AmonHen
cards.quote: AmonHen crowns the river with a stern eye, as if watching for the same doom that once came south.

cards.name: AnKaragmir
cards.quote: AnKaragmir is a dark hold of old metal and older grudges, and the stone remembers every strike.

cards.name: Ashkiri
cards.quote: Ashkiri is ash-bright and watchful, as if the land had learned to glare back at the sun.

cards.name: BaradHarn
cards.quote: BaradHarn lifts a grim tower over the waste, and its shadow reaches farther than its walls.

cards.name: CarasMirilond
cards.quote: CarasMirilond glows with a pale remnant of grandeur, though time has thinned its banners.

cards.name: CarasTolfalas
cards.quote: CarasTolfalas clings to the sea-wind with the stubborn grace of stone weathered but unbroken.

cards.name: Carvarad
cards.quote: Carvarad holds itself like a fortress of old resolve, half-buried in memory and rain.

cards.name: Elgaer
cards.quote: Elgaer is ringed with a quiet that makes every hoofbeat sound like trespass.

cards.name: Havens of Umbar
cards.quote: The Havens of Umbar smile to the sea like a bright knife hidden in silk.

cards.name: Ilanin
cards.quote: Ilanin is quiet under the east wind, and its stillness feels like a warning held back.

cards.name: Isigir
cards.quote: Isigir feels like a gate forgotten by empire and remembered by none but crows.

cards.name: Kas Shadoul
cards.quote: Kas Shadoul stands under a heat-hazed sky, and its walls seem to hoard the dayÃƒÂ¢Ã¢â€šÂ¬Ã¢â€žÂ¢s last breath.

cards.name: KasShafra
cards.quote: KasShafra clings to the edge of the southern heat, where even shadow seems worn thin.

cards.name: Methir
cards.quote: Methir keeps the old road under a guarded sky, and every stone there seems to have a watcher.

cards.name: Riavod
cards.quote: Riavod is crossed by old rumors and older streams, and neither has lost its way.

cards.name: Shrel-Kain
cards.quote: Shrel-Kain broods in silence, as if the dark there had learned to wait.

cards.name: Sturlurtsa Khand
cards.quote: Sturlurtsa Khand keeps the hard memory of a road where riders once vanished into dust.

cards.name: Wolves
cards.quote: The howl of the pack heralds the hunt's beginning.

cards.name: Angulion
cards.quote: From the depths of despair, I rise as a storm upon the horizon.

cards.name: Arfanhil
cards.quote: From ashes shall rise the fire that consumes our foes.

cards.name: Aonghas
cards.quote: The vale of shadows shall know my wrath.

cards.name: Enion
cards.quote: In silence, I weave the fate of those who dare oppose me.

cards.name: Dorwinion
cards.quote: A realm of lush vineyards and fine wines, where joy and celebration reign.

cards.name: NearHarad
cards.quote: Where the sun scorches the earth, life thrives in the shadows.

cards.name: Rhovanion
cards.quote: Wide plains stretch beneath sweeping skies, where tales of valor are born.

cards.name: Umbar
cards.quote: The shadowy shores of Umbar whisper tales of treachery and lost ships.

cards.name: Balchoth
cards.quote: From the depths of darkness, we rise to cleanse the earth with fire and steel.

cards.name: Wain Riders
cards.quote: With wheels that thunder and hearts that burn, we conquer the roads of men.

cards.name: Of Many Colours
cards.quote: White light can be broken into its parts. I have seen each one clearly. That is why the others feared me.
cards.actionEffect: Saruman who broke the white for pride: cavalry <sprite name="mounts"> unmatched, <sprite name="gold"><sprite name="leather"> in flood. <sprite name="iron"> starved — brilliance without foundation.

cards.name: False Parley
cards.quote: Words can be as sharp as swords; choose them wisely.
cards.actionEffect: The two easternmost allied armies gain +1 <sprite name="hc"> and +1 <sprite name="lc">.

cards.name: Lured by Halflings' Leaf
cards.quote: The sweet scent of the Shire can ensnare even the mightiest of foes.
cards.actionEffect: Target enemy Maia in radius 2: Halted <sprite name="halted"> (1 turn) and Blocked <sprite name="blocked"> (2 turns).

cards.name: Sniped!
cards.quote: A swift arrow flies, carrying the promise of fear and pain.
cards.actionEffect: Target enemy in same/adjacent hex: inflict small wound and Fear <sprite name="fear"> (1 turn).

cards.name: FarHarad
cards.quote: The lands of FarHarad stretch under the weight of sun and sand.

cards.name: Pirates
cards.quote: The sea calls to us, and we answer with steel and sails.

cards.name: Bow of Alatar
cards.quote: The eastern hunter's bow does not miss what the eye has chosen.
cards.actionEffect: Target enemy character in radius 1: wound for 15. If caster has Mage <sprite name="mage"> 3+, also reveal the target's surroundings for 1 turn.

cards.name: Hood of Pallando
cards.quote: Beneath Pallando's hood, even the road forgets its traveler.
cards.actionEffect: Target allied character in this hex gains Hidden <sprite name="hidden"> (2 turns). The caster reveals radius 2 for 1 turn.

cards.name: Pallando
cards.quote: The sea calls to me, its depths holding secrets untold.

cards.name: Alatar
cards.quote: From the East I come, seeking wisdom among the stars.

cards.name: Nindalf
cards.quote: In the quiet valley, the river sings a timeless song.

cards.name: Rhudaur
cards.quote: Rhudaur keeps its watch in broken and haunted silence.

cards.name: Dagorlad
cards.quote: Where the shadows of war linger, the ghosts of past battles still whisper.

cards.name: Ring of Orthanc
cards.quote: The ring upon the White Hand weighs heavier than iron, and those who see it know the tower's will.
cards.actionEffect: The stone sings to those of Saruman’s order. Allied characters here heal 15 (25 on Orthanc); allied army commanders gain 1 Heavy Infantry <sprite name="hi"> (2 on Orthanc).

cards.name: Deceiving the White Council
cards.quote: He told us to seek the Ring in the Gladden Fields. He had known for long where it lay.
cards.actionEffect: Lies woven with half-truths, half-believed. Enemies in radius 3 gain Blocked <sprite name="blocked"> (2) and Halted <sprite name="halted">.

cards.name: Robe of Many Colours
cards.quote: He was not Saruman the White; he was Saruman of Many Colours.
cards.actionEffect: The colours dazzle and the moment passes. Strip all positive effects from a target enemy and their hex-mates; the caster gains Haste <sprite name="haste"> and Hidden <sprite name="hidden">.

cards.name: Study of the Rings
cards.quote: He had spent long years in the study of ring-lore, and his knowledge of their making was second to none among the living.
cards.actionEffect: Knowledge of the Nine strips away what others would hide. The caster gains Haste <sprite name="haste"> (2) and reveals all Hidden <sprite name="hidden"> enemies within 4 hexes.
